sections.paragraph:
feminine noun שימחה (>>שמחה)

happiness, joy, gladness, merriment, gaiety, bliss, felicity, jubilation, joyousness, gayness, geniality, glee, gleefulness, hilariousness, jocundity, jollification, jolliness, jollity, jovialit
